title: USCIS AI Assistant
tagline: Plain-English N-400 naturalization prep that fills the form for you (work in progress)
description: A guided service that walks applicants through the USCIS N-400 (Naturalization) form in plain English, generates a filled, print-ready PDF, and produces a personalized document checklist.
impact: Translates dense immigration forms into a guided, plain-English flow
Generates a filled, print-ready N-400 PDF from user answers
Builds a personalized document checklist per applicant
Containerized full-stack app: FastAPI backend + Next.js frontend
runLocally: Full-stack FastAPI + Next.js app; run locally with Docker.

title: RAG Study Chatbot
tagline: Answers from your own notes, not from pretraining
description: A retrieval-augmented study assistant that answers from user-uploaded content, keeping responses current and grounded in your material rather than the model's pretraining.
impact: Custom RAG pipeline: format-aware extraction → overlap chunking → embeddings → persistent vector index
Source-grounded responses so answers stay current vs. pretraining
Streamlit interface with document upload, chat history, and citations
Runs locally on Ollama (Qwen 7B), fully private

title: AI Wordle Duel
tagline: Race optimized AI solvers across multiple word lengths
description: A full-stack word-guessing game featuring AI opponents powered by algorithmic solvers. Play daily Wordle, challenge the AI with custom words, or race it head-to-head across 3-7 letter words.
impact: Four modes: Daily Wordle, Challenge AI, Race Mode, and Human Play
Variable word lengths (3-7 letters) with intelligent solving
Real-time competitive play with live scoreboard and turn indicators
End-to-end TypeScript architecture deployed on Vercel

title: Spotify Recommendation Engine
tagline: Explainable music discovery powered by audio DSP + vector search
description: A full-stack Spotify intelligence platform that authenticates via OAuth, ingests tracks and playlists, and surfaces explainable recommendations using FAISS vector search blended with librosa DSP features.
impact: PKCE OAuth with Spotify and secure HTTP-only token storage
Blends librosa DSP descriptors with Spotify audio features for richer vectors
Genre-aware re-ranking and diversity guardrails avoid repetitive picks
Explains why each track was recommended
runLocally: FastAPI + Next.js; run with Docker Compose and a Spotify client ID.

title: Rock Paper Scissors Mind Game
tagline: An online-learning AI that adapts to how you play
description: An intelligent game that learns and adapts to player patterns in real time, combining a TensorFlow/Keras model with behavioral frequency heuristics and streak detection.
impact: Launched publicly and reached 1,000+ unique visitors
Deep learning blended with behavioral heuristics and streak detection
Production FastAPI backend served behind a Vercel frontend
Docker Compose for reproducible environments

title: Code Problem Studio
tagline: A local-first AI coding tutor with teaching scaffolds + UML
description: A chat-style coding tutor that takes a prompt (or image + caption), then returns a runnable solution, a TODO-based teaching scaffold, complexity notes, and interactive UML, all running locally via Ollama with no API keys.
impact: Local-only inference via Ollama - fully private, no external keys
Structured output: teaching, examples, reasoning, complexity, solution
Interactive UML diagrams with zoom and copy controls
Vision support: solve from a screenshot of a problem
runLocally: React + Vite frontend with a FastAPI backend; needs a local Ollama model.

title: Tennis Match Modeling
tagline: Predicting ATP match winners from historical data
description: An ML study that engineers features from decades of ATP match data and trains gradient-boosted and random-forest models to predict the winner between two players.
impact: Live Streamlit dashboard: pick a year range and train models in-browser
Leakage-free feature engineering over 1990-2024 ATP match records
Compares logistic regression and random-forest classifiers with time-aware splits
Explores how player and match context drive win probability
runLocally: Interactive training dashboard; run the local notebook/app to reproduce.

title: AAOC Planner
tagline: Average Age of Credit calculator with what-if planning
description: A financial planning tool that calculates your current Average Age of Credit and runs what-if scenarios for future credit decisions, built on a modular object-oriented architecture.
impact: Automates Average Age of Credit calculations
Runs what-if scenarios for future credit planning
Modular OOP design for extensibility and maintainability
CI via GitHub Actions
runLocally: Python tool with a local web UI; clone and run to use the planner.

title: AI Solution Architect
tagline: Turns a rough business idea into a structured implementation plan
description: A multi-agent system that takes a vague business idea and runs a pipeline of specialized agents (analyst, architecture, roadmap, risk, impact) to produce a structured, fully-editable implementation plan, streamed live over SSE.
impact: Pipeline of specialized agents via forced tool-use
Live SSE streaming of each agent's output
Per-agent error isolation so one failure doesn't abort the run
Deterministic offline mock mode for development
runLocally: FastAPI + Next.js with SSE streaming; run locally (offline mock mode available).

title: TaxAssistant
tagline: Guided tax-year prep with AI document extraction
description: A guided tax-preparation app that organizes filing info, people, and documents, builds tax worksheets and a 1040 view, and uses AI to extract data from uploaded tax documents (with a manual fallback).
impact: Structured worksheets (brackets, deductions, Schedule E) with CSV export
AI document extraction with retry/timeout + graceful no-key fallback
Local SQLite persistence, no cloud dependency
Accessible UI with error boundaries and recovery flows
runLocally: Next.js app with local SQLite; run with npm to organize a tax year.

title: Maison - Multiplayer Casino
tagline: Play roulette, blackjack, poker, slots & plinko with friends in real time
description: A real-time multiplayer casino where friends join a shared room by code and play five games together, with server-authoritative chip balances, drag-and-drop betting, and an admin panel.
impact: Five games: Roulette, Blackjack, Slots, Plinko, and No-Limit Texas Hold'em
Real-time shared rooms with synced, server-authoritative balances
Drag-and-drop chip betting with correct payouts and crypto RNG
Admin panel for managing players and balances
Playable solo demo embedded here — the same game engines, running fully client-side (no server)
runLocally: Multiplayer needs the Node + Socket.io server; the embedded demo here plays the solo games (roulette, blackjack, slots, plinko) with no backend.

title: Damped Pendulum Lab
tagline: Interactive cart-pendulum physics, verified against analytical solutions
description: An interactive physics sandbox simulating a damped cart-pendulum, with live controls for mass, length, gravity, and damping, plus energy and phase-space plots. The dynamics are verified against closed-form damped-oscillator solutions.
impact: Full coupled cart-pendulum equations of motion via RK4
Verified vs analytical solutions across under/critical/over-damped regimes
Live energy + phase-space visualization
Real-time controls with damping-regime detection

title: European Roulette Table
tagline: A polished single-player roulette table you can play right here
description: A self-contained European (single-zero) roulette table rendered on HTML5 Canvas, with drag-and-drop-style chip betting, inside/outside bets, a spinning wheel, payouts, and bet history — no server required.
impact: Single-zero European wheel with correct payouts and crypto-grade RNG
Full betting board: straight, splits, columns, dozens, and even-money bets
Animated canvas wheel with result banner and spin history
Fully client-side — plays instantly in the browser with no backend

title: Receipt Splitter
tagline: Split a receipt fairly, with AI extraction or manual entry
description: A bill-splitting tool that turns a photo of a receipt into itemized costs using built-in Gemini vision extraction (or manual entry) and divides totals across people, including shared items, tax, and tip.
impact: Snap a receipt and let Gemini vision itemize it automatically
Assign items to people, handle shared items, tax, and tip
Per-person totals with validation guards
AI extraction is built in — users don't need their own API key
runLocally: Next.js app; the hosted demo has Gemini extraction built in (manual mode also available).
